caption: A man in a white long-sleeved tunic stands and speaks into a handheld microphone, holding it close to his mouth. To his left, another man stands attentively, wearing a pink shirt layered with a black sleeveless vest and a blue lanyard with a white identification badge. In the background, a third individual wearing a mask is partially visible behind them. The scene takes place indoors against a pale yellow wall and white curtains. Across the sequence, the speakers remain in the same positions with minimal movement; the man in white continues to address the audience while the man in the vest maintains a steady, focused gaze. There are no logos, on-screen text, or other equipment visible in the frames, and the composition remains consistent throughout the clip.
